_comment: Audio is downloaded MANUALLY through WisconsinEye's own terms gate — we do
not scrape it. Their archive is account-gated behind Cloudflare and their
terms prohibit sharing the generated media location link, so no media URL
ever appears in this file, in Convex, or in any client payload. Only the
PUBLIC program permalink below is stored and rendered.
audioFile is matched case-insensitively against the download directory.
candidateSlug is the BadgerBrief slug and is NOT always a slugify of the
name WisconsinEye uses — 'Andrew Manske' is 'andy-manske' here.
